subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The hidden Treasure hath appeared and the concealed Name hath been made manifest. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله قد ظهر الکنز المخزون و الاسم المکنون طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
